title: Software Engineer
description: Designs, writes, and debugs software applications and system utilities.

overview.degree: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science / IT (B.E. / B.Tech or BCA/MCA)
overview.workEnvironment: Remote / Office (Desk-based, high-collaboration software teams)

entranceExams: State-level Engineering Entrances (e.g., MHT CET, COMEDK, WBJEE)
dayInLife: Writing clean, scalable code in languages like JavaScript, Java, Python, or C++.
Participating in daily stand-up meetings to coordinate with product managers and designers.
Debugging issues, reviewing peer code, and writing unit tests.
Designing software architecture and database schemas.

class9.title: Learn Coding Foundations
class9.description: Start with visual programming languages like Scratch or basic Python.

class9.title: Develop Logical Reasoning
class9.description: Participate in math contests, puzzles, and basic algorithmic games.

class10.title: Choose Computer Electives
class10.description: Opt for computer science or coding electives under CBSE/ICSE boards.

class10.title: Build Simple Utilities
class10.description: Create command-line applications like calculators or text adventures.

class11_12.title: Study Computer Science with Math
class11_12.description: Select the PCM (Physics, Chemistry, Math) stream with Computer Science.

class11_12.title: Prepare for Engineering Entrances
class11_12.description: Prepare for exams like JEE Main, BITSAT, and state CETs.

diploma.title: Diploma in Computer Engineering
diploma.description: Pursue a 3-year polytechnic diploma focusing on hardware, networking, and programming.

diploma.title: Learn Web Development
diploma.description: Acquire skills in HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript.

diploma.title: Lateral Entry Preparation
diploma.description: Prepare for state lateral entry exams to enter engineering college in the 2nd year.

undergraduate.title: Bachelor's in CSE, IT, or BCA/MCA
undergraduate.description: Complete a B.Tech/B.E. in Computer Science or a BCA+MCA track.

undergraduate.title: Master Data Structures & Algorithms
undergraduate.description: Solve problems on LeetCode/GeeksforGeeks to clear technical interviews.

undergraduate.title: Industry Internship
undergraduate.description: Complete a 3-6 month software development internship.

certifications.name: AWS Certified Developer
certifications.description: Validates technical expertise in developing and maintaining applications on AWS.

certifications.name: Oracle Certified Professional Java SE
certifications.description: Demonstrates deep knowledge of Java programming language and APIs.

certifications.name: Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA)
certifications.description: Verifies ability to configure and manage production-grade Kubernetes clusters.

topColleges.name: International Institute of Information Technology (IIIT) Hyderabad

careerProgression.responsibilities: Coding specific features, debugging issues, and learning the software development lifecycle under supervision.
Owning feature modules, writing clean code, reviewing peers' PRs, and designing minor sub-systems.
Designing end-to-end software architecture, mentoring junior developers, and leading sprint planning.
Defining technical vision, managing engineering teams, and aligning business requirements with system engineering.

title: Data Scientist
description: Analyzes complex datasets using mathematics, statistics, and machine learning models to extract business intelligence.

overview.degree: Bachelor's Degree in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, or Mathematics
overview.workEnvironment: Office / Hybrid (Highly analytical desk job focusing on data engineering and machine learning)

dayInLife: Cleaning and pre-processing raw data from multiple databases.
Building and fine-tuning predictive models using machine learning libraries.
Writing SQL queries to extract data and performing exploratory data analysis (EDA).
Creating interactive dashboards to present findings to company stakeholders.

class9.title: Excel in Statistics and Probability
class9.description: Focus on mathematical concepts like averages, percentages, and basic data distributions.

class9.title: Learn Spreadsheet Software
class9.description: Practice sorting, filtering, and writing formulas in Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets.

class10.title: Build Quantitative Aptitude
class10.description: Excel in algebraic equations and analytical reasoning.

class10.title: Begin Learning Python
class10.description: Start with Python programming basics, focusing on syntax and basic calculations.

class11_12.title: Take Science with Mathematics
class11_12.description: Excel in high school calculus, linear algebra, and advanced probability.

class11_12.title: Participate in Math Olympiads
class11_12.description: Develop deep logical thinking and mathematical problem-solving skills.

diploma.title: Diploma in Computer Engineering / IT
diploma.description: Enroll in polytechnic, prioritizing database management systems (DBMS) and math modules.

diploma.title: Learn SQL Basics
diploma.description: Take online courses to learn relational database queries and operations.

diploma.title: Lateral Entry Exams
diploma.description: Prepare for direct entry into second-year engineering courses.

undergraduate.title: Pursue B.Tech in Data Science/CS or B.Sc in Statistics/Math
undergraduate.description: Focus on linear algebra, multivariate calculus, probability theory, and database systems.

undergraduate.title: Learn ML Frameworks & Python Libraries
undergraduate.description: Master Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and SQL.

undergraduate.title: Participate in Kaggle Competitions
undergraduate.description: Work on real-world datasets and showcase predictions on Kaggle.

certifications.description: Verifies competence in processing, analyzing, and visualizing data using Power BI.

certifications.name: Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate
certifications.description: Foundational certificate covering data cleaning, analysis, and visualization.

resources.title: StatQuest with Josh Starmer YouTube channel

careerProgression.stage: Associate Data Analyst / Junior Data Scientist
careerProgression.responsibilities: Querying databases, cleaning data, and creating visualization reports.
Building machine learning models, deploying APIs, and designing experiments.
Designing analytics architecture, managing production models, and aligning with business strategy.

careerProgression.stage: Lead Data Scientist / Chief Data Officer
careerProgression.responsibilities: Directing overall enterprise data strategies and leading data science departments.

title: Cloud Engineer

dayInLife: Configuring and deploying cloud servers and container systems.
Monitoring cloud systems for performance, reliability, and scaling issues.
Writing script pipelines for automated software builds (CI/CD).
Optimizing cloud resource usage to reduce infrastructure billing.

careerProgression.responsibilities: Monitoring cloud infrastructure, handling access logs, and executing deploy scripts under guidance.
Managing database scaling, maintaining system backups, setting up security firewalls, and automating routine tasks.
Designing high-availability hybrid clouds, directing deployment plans, and supervising DevOps engineers.

careerProgression.stage: Principal Cloud Architect / Director of Infrastructure
careerProgression.responsibilities: Directing overall IT infrastructure strategy, managing multi-vendor cloud relationships, and ensuring enterprise-wide system uptime.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Protects company networks and user data from security breaches, hacking attempts, and malware.

overview.degree: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, IT, or Cybersecurity
overview.workEnvironment: Office / Security Operations Center (SOC) (High-alert environments monitoring real-time attacks)

dayInLife: Analyzing security logs and alerts for suspicious traffic patterns.
Conducting vulnerability assessments and penetration testing of applications.
Responding to active security incidents and isolating compromised servers.
Drafting and enforcing company-wide information security policies.

class9.title: Learn Computer Networking Fundamentals
class9.description: Understand basic protocols like IP addresses, routing, and DNS.

class9.title: Join Hacking/Cybersecurity Interest Groups
class9.description: Explore entry-level forums and watch ethical hacking tutorials.

class10.title: Master Linux Command Line
class10.description: Learn filesystem commands, script utilities, and file permission setups.

class10.title: Academic Stream Preparation
class10.description: Score well in mathematics to develop logical modeling skills.

class11_12.title: Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics (PCM)
class11_12.description: Focus on discrete math and logic, which are essential for cryptography.

class11_12.title: Practice basic programming
class11_12.description: Learn languages like Python and C++ for scripting security tools.

diploma.title: Diploma in Cyber Security / Computer Engineering
diploma.description: Enroll in a polytechnic program focusing on computer networks, cryptography, and server admin.

diploma.title: CompTIA Security+ Certification
diploma.description: Study core cybersecurity principles and obtain this globally recognized certificate.

diploma.title: Prepare for Direct Engineering Entry
diploma.description: Study lateral entry exam syllabus for undergraduate engineering.

undergraduate.title: B.Tech in CSE / Information Security
undergraduate.description: Complete engineering studies specializing in network security, database management, and operating systems.

undergraduate.title: Participate in Capture The Flag (CTF) Challenges
undergraduate.description: Compete in online security contests to practice hacking and defense skills.

undergraduate.title: Secure Security Internships
undergraduate.description: Work as a security trainee in a SOC team or corporate IT audit department.

certifications.name: Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH)
certifications.description: Validates credentials in finding vulnerabilities in target systems using hacker tools.

certifications.name: CompTIA Security+
certifications.description: Establish core security knowledge required for IT security roles.

certifications.name: Certified Information Systems Security Professional (CISSP)
certifications.description: Elite certification proving deep design, implementation, and management capabilities in cybersecurity.

topColleges.name: Indian Institute of Information Technology (IIIT) Allahabad
Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology (MNNIT)

careerProgression.responsibilities: Monitoring system alarms, performing basic log checks, and escalating suspicious activities.
Running audits, scanning system vulnerabilities, mock-hacking infrastructure, and writing security patches.
Designing defense architectures, directing disaster recovery during active breaches, and mentoring analysts.
Managing overall corporate security budget, reporting risks to the board, and designing company-wide privacy rules.

Responding to emergency ward calls and handling ward rounds.

dayInLife: Researching case laws and statutes using digital legal databases.
Drafting legal briefs, contracts, agreements, and notices.
Representing clients and presenting arguments in courtroom hearings.
Meeting clients, negotiating settlement terms, and offering legal advice.

careerProgression.responsibilities: Assisting senior engineers, performing basic calculations, CAD drafting, and daily site supervision.

Managing large-scale project execution, timelines, site budgets, client interactions, and team resources.
Directing entire organizational divisions, leading bidding and procurement processes, and defining corporate business development strategies.

title: Digital Marketer
description: Manages brand social networks, targets advertising, and tracks campaign metric percentages.

overview.degree: Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Commerce, Business, or Communications (MBA helpful)
overview.workEnvironment: Office / Remote (Fast-paced desk job, high interaction with graphics and analytics dashboards)

entranceExams: General Undergraduate Common Entrance Tests (e.g. CUET)
dayInLife: Analyzing campaign click-through rates on Google Analytics and Meta Ads manager.
Brainstorming social media campaign concepts with copywriters and designers.
Setting up email newsletters and search engine optimization keywords.
Compiling digital performance reports to justify ad spend budgets to managers.

class9.title: Develop Reading & Communication Skills
class9.description: Read widely, study writing styles, and participate in creative writing events.

class9.title: Explore Social Media Dynamics
class9.description: Understand what makes online videos, posts, and advertisements popular.

class10.title: Excel in English and Social Sciences
class10.description: Hone articulation and presentation capabilities during class boards.

class10.title: Learn Basic Image Editing
class10.description: Create social media graphics or logos using Canva or Photoshop.

class11_12.title: Select Commerce or Arts Stream
class11_12.description: Study Business Studies, Economics, Entrepreneurship, and Informatics.

class11_12.title: Launch a Social Channel or Blog
class11_12.description: Start a blog, YouTube channel, or Instagram theme page to learn content scaling.

diploma.title: Diploma in Digital Marketing & Media
diploma.description: Enroll in a 2-year diploma focusing on SEO, SMM, copywriting, and basic analytics tools.

diploma.title: Run Small Budget Ads
diploma.description: Run basic paid promotions for local businesses or personal channels.

diploma.title: Prepare for Higher Degree Admission
diploma.description: Prepare for undergraduate management or commerce entrance exams.

undergraduate.title: Complete Bachelor's in BBA / B.Com / Mass Communication
undergraduate.description: Pursue a graduate program emphasizing marketing theory, consumer psychology, and statistics.

undergraduate.title: Acquire Google and Meta Marketing Credentials
undergraduate.description: Obtain certifications in Google Ads, Meta Blueprint, and HubSpot Academy.

undergraduate.title: Complete Digital Marketing Agency Internship
undergraduate.description: Intern as an ad manager, content strategist, or SEO analyst at a digital agency.

certifications.name: Google Ads Search Certification
certifications.description: Proves expert competency in designing, running, and measuring search engine campaigns.

certifications.name: HubSpot Inbound Marketing Certification
certifications.description: Validates core skills in content marketing, lead generation, and customer nurturing workflows.

certifications.name: Meta Certified Digital Marketing Associate
certifications.description: Demonstrates baseline skills in advertising on Facebook, Instagram, and Messenger apps.

careerProgression.responsibilities: Creating daily calendar posts, researching keywords, compiling links, and scheduling newsletters.
Managing paid ad budgets, optimizing ad designs, conducting A/B test splits, and coordinating with graphic designers.
Leading digital strategy teams, managing client campaigns, directing marketing spend distributions, and evaluating overall client ROIs.

careerProgression.stage: Chief Marketing Officer (CMO) / VP of Digital
careerProgression.responsibilities: Defining firm-wide brand campaigns, managing multi-crore budgets, approving major brand sponsorships, and presenting metrics to corporate board.
